description.value: Aura moderate necromancy; CL 12th; Slot none; Price 80,318 gp; Weight 10 lbs. DESCRIPTION Note: This magic item grants characters additional hero points or allows the possibility of recovering points as they are spent. See Hero Points for full details. The black blade of this +2 keen unholy scythe reflects faint images of the souls of those it has claimed. Whenever the scythe is used to drop a creature to â1 hit points or less, the creature must immediately make a DC 14 Will save or be instantly slain. If the reaverâs scythe kills a creature, either through damage or because the creature failed its Will save, the wielder immediately receives 1 hero point. This hero point must be used within 1 hour or it is lost. The wielder cannot gain another hero point from the scythe until the first is used or lost. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells keen edge, malediction, unholy blight; Cost 40,318 gp
